name: zsnd_sample_set_destroy
description: zSndSampleSet::Destroy releases owned sample data for a loaded sample set and clears the loaded flag.
known_limits: Functional-equivalent only; no VC COFF byte-comparison target covers this address yet, so Binary-safe remains false.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation at 0x4a0e40 validates returning 0 for null or already-unloaded sets, iterating sampleCount entries through zSndSample::DestroyOwnedData when loaded, clearing resourcesLoaded, and returning 1.
The native smoke covers zSndSampleSet_DestroyByName reaching this helper for a loaded set, clearing resourcesLoaded, and returning 0 for a missing set.
